message:
Add 14 error recovery behavioral tests to daemon module

Tests verify graceful recovery from various error conditions:
- Device disconnect sets connected flag correctly
- State preserved through disconnect/reconnect cycles
- Mode (volume/mic) preserved through disconnects
- Button state handling on mid-press disconnect
- Click/rotation processing works after reconnect
- Stats not corrupted by error conditions
- Config reload works during error state
- Running flag not affected by device errors
- Mic mode timer continues during disconnect
- Daemon recoverable after many error cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"DIAL-73g","title":"Daemon Behavioral Test Suite","description":"Expand daemon tests from trivial structural tests (3 tests checking equality and defaults) to comprehensive behavioral tests. The daemon module is critical for background operation and currently has the weakest test coverage.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Tests verify daemon lifecycle: start, run, stop, restart
2. Tests verify signal handling behavior (SIGTERM, SIGINT, SIGHUP)
3. Tests verify PID file creation and cleanup
4. Tests verify log file handling during daemon operation
5. Tests verify graceful shutdown behavior
6. Tests verify error recovery scenarios
7.
